metaTitle: Changelog — Prosperity | Loot Overhaul for Minecraft
metaDescription: Release history for Prosperity: every released version with its changes, linked to the canonical GitHub Releases page.
ogDescription: Release history for Prosperity with per-version changes.
title: Changelog
lede: Every released version. Jars and full notes live on GitHub Releases — the canonical download source.

html: Prosperity is in active development ahead of its first public release. This page will list each version once releases begin.

blocks.html: Watch the releases page for the first tagged build.

html: Prosperity follows semantic versioning. The public API surface (com.rfizzle.prosperity.api) is stable across patch and minor releases; a breaking API change requires a major version bump and a changelog entry naming the broken signature.
